title: Venezuelan Peanut Casserole
description: A rich and creamy dessert combining Venezuelan peanut flavor with gooey chocolate. Perfect for a special treat.
instructions: Combine Venezuelan Peanut Butter, Gooey Chocolate Chips, and Bitter Dark Chocolate in a medium bowl.
Stir until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is smooth.
Add Granulated Sugar, Salt, and stir until combined.
Beat in Large Eggs and stir until smooth.
Melt Unsalted Butter in a microwave-safe bowl and stir in Vanilla Extract.
Pour the melted butter mixture into the peanut butter mixture and stir until combined.
Pour the mixture into a greased casserole dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly gooey.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
